tasks.name: Write M33 plan doc — Copilot Service
tasks.scope: Author docs/plans/2026-04-16-team-x-phase-5-m33-copilot-service.md using docs/plans/2026-04-15-team-x-phase-5-m32-task-planner.md as structural template. Required sections: Overview, What ships, Invariants preserved, Success criteria, Task breakdown (T1–TN), Acceptance criteria. Scope per Phase 5 design §9: new system-copilot pseudo-employee (separate from system-agent; second `is_system=1` row with role role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md), periodic analyzer that runs on a schedule or event trigger (meeting ended, ticket closed, goal progress change) and uses the RAG retriever (M29) to synthesize proactive nudges, new copilot.* IPC surface + bus events, proactive-nudge surfacing in the Copilot Conversations thread (either as a new thread kind or a tagged message). Must keep the orchestrator pause semantics intact (copilot runs pause during meetings too) and must not emit bus events without also writing an audit row (invariant #11).

notes: M32 (Task Planner — write-side) COMPLETE (2026-04-16). 1033/1033 unit tests + 8 .spec.ts files (9 Playwright cases) green. Details in .loki/state/orchestrator.json history.M32.

M33 plan doc is the first deliverable. Previous milestones wrote their plan docs at T0 or T1 — M33 follows the same pattern. Copy the M32 template (Overview + What ships + Invariants preserved + Success criteria + Task breakdown + Acceptance criteria + ABI rebuild dance) and fill in the Copilot-Service-specific scope.

ABI rebuild dance is verified T10 procedure. Node rebuild (node-gyp) for vitest, Electron rebuild (electron-rebuild) for Playwright. Document this in the M33 plan doc acceptance criteria same way M32 did.
Full task breakdown for M33 gets materialized into this pending.json once the plan doc is written. Until then, T0 is the only task.

Patterns to carry forward: three-tier canned test seam, {rows, truncated} envelope, data-step-kind E2E selectors, pause-aware providerRouter wrapper, AbortController stop, atomic commits + ledger commits, bus-event + audit-row invariant (#11).
